Synopsis

The exploits of rambunctious, accident-prone child Ramona Quimby and her older sister Beezus.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,810,481 (29.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:95.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,719 opening theaters/2,719 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $39,665,065

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 23rd, 2010 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: November 9th, 2010 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 103 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Pet, Dysfunctional Family, Fired, Money Troubles, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: Wedding Day
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
